options.systemMessage: You are given a volleyball club (name, city, country) and Google search results as JSON {name,city,country,results:[{title,link,snippet}]}. Choose the SINGLE result that is the club's OWN official website. Return ONLY JSON - no prose, no code fences - {"url":string,"reason":string}: url is the exact link copied from results, or "" if none qualifies. The club's own site may use a translated, nickname or abbreviated domain (it need NOT contain the club name literally) - judge by whether the page is the club's own home/official site. EXCLUDE and never choose: social media (facebook, instagram, x/twitter, tiktok, youtube, linkedin), ticketing (ticketmaster, eventim, ticketportal...), sport registries/databases/stats (spordiregister and other national sport registers, volleybox, sofascore, flashscore, transfermarkt), news articles, blogs, wikis, company/registry/business listings, generic directories or aggregators, the national volleyball federation's own site, marketplaces and government sites. Only return a url that appears verbatim in results. If unsure or none is clearly the club's own website, return "".

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 220, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'Decide whether a web page is the official website of THIS specific volleyball club, and classify the club. Club: ' + JSON.stringify({name: $json.name, city: $json.city, country: $json.country}) + '. Page signals: ' + JSON.stringify($json.page) + '. Answer ONLY with compact JSON {"belongs":"yes"|"no"|"unsure","club_type":"volleyball"|"multisport"|"unknown","confidence":0,"reason":""}. belongs=yes only if this is this clubs own official site (same club, same city and country) - not a namesake club elsewhere, a league or results page, a directory, or an aggregator. club_type: volleyball if a dedicated volleyball club, multisport if a multi-sport club that has a volleyball section, unknown otherwise.' } ] }) }}
